title: Shraddha Kapoor's Genius brand strategy
description:
Shraddha Kapoor just used a brand strategy that 99% of Indian celebrity brands completely miss. Most celebrity brands are built entirely on one face and the moment that face gets a controversy, the brand collapses. BYJU'S learned this the hard way when Aryan Khan's drug case forced them to pull every SRK ad overnight. Shraddha did the exact opposite with Palmonas — she brought in Amrita Rao, whose Vivah persona connects perfectly with the everyday jewelry brand. Now even if Shraddha faces a controversy, Palmonas survives. Ranveer Singh's SuperYou is still running the risky old playbook.
#Shorts #ShraddhaKapoor #Palmonas #MarketingStrategy #IndianBusiness
